code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut best = ""
    mut best_len = 0
    mut start = 0
    mut in_word = false
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i <= n
      mut is_sep = true
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
            is_sep = true
          else
            is_sep = false
          end
        when None
          is_sep = true
        end
      end
      if is_sep
        if in_word
          let word = string.substring(line, start, i)
          let wlen = string.len(word)
          if wlen > best_len
            best = word
            best_len = wlen
          end
          in_word = false
        end
      else
        if not in_word
          start = i
          in_word = true
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("longest=#{best}")
  when None
    println("longest=")
  end
end
